name: io.github.applefanaimail-blip/mcp-server
title: BridgeNode — DeepSeek V4 Flash via x402
description: DeepSeek V4 Flash inference via x402 protocol. Pay per request with Solana USDC. No registration, no API keys, no KYC.

authentication.description: Ed25519 signature auth: send X-Address (Solana wallet) + X-Nonce (UUID) + X-Signature (base64 ed25519 of nonce) as tool arguments
